Class EntityTags

java.lang.Object
io.papermc.paper.tag.EntityTags
public class EntityTags extends Object
All tags in this class are unmodifiable, attempting to modify them will throw an UnsupportedOperationException.

    Description
    static final EntitySetTag

    Covers all horses

    • UNDEADS

      @Deprecated(since="1.21.8") public static final EntitySetTag UNDEADS
      Deprecated.
      in favour of Tag.ENTITY_TYPES_UNDEAD
      Covers undead mobs

    • WATER_BASED

      @Deprecated(since="1.21") public static final EntitySetTag WATER_BASED
      Deprecated.
      in favour of Tag.ENTITY_TYPES_AQUATIC
      Covers all water based mobs
      See Also:
      • https://minecraft.wiki/wiki/Mob#Aquatic_mobs
